summary: P0/P0.5/P1 Priority Features Full QA Sweep (Iteration 507). All 20 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: Push notification endpoints, BattlePulse with competitive signals, StoryViewerPage with battle_rank display, TrendingPublicFeed with hook text overlays and LIVE indicators.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: POST /api/push/subscribe accepts push subscription with endpoint and keys
VERIFIED: GET /api/push/vapid-key returns VAPID public key (BBxi2OZkd5YNPrkbGpuN26dUdACa70uM7xkcn5Jc2scG9iXnqk_D2jFEcF2ZEo4KdW1TWQUwRxGLIQnopt7DVbU)
VERIFIED: GET /api/stories/battle-pulse/{rootId} returns pulse with moment data and user_rank
VERIFIED: GET /api/stories/viewer/{jobId} returns battle_rank field for branch stories
VERIFIED: POST /api/stories/increment-metric triggers rank change notifications via check_and_send_rank_notifications
VERIFIED: check_and_send_rank_notifications pushes to ALL dropped users using battle_rank_snapshot collection
VERIFIED: ALLOWED_TRIGGERS includes rank_drop, war_overtake, near_win, war_winner
VERIFIED: trigger_rank_drop_push function exists and is callable
VERIFIED: Service worker sw-push.js handles push events with trigger-specific actions
VERIFIED: Service worker has requireInteraction=true for rank_drop (persistent notification)
VERIFIED: Service worker has aggressive vibration pattern [200, 100, 200, 100, 300] for rank_drop
VERIFIED: BattlePulse component renders push notification prompt when user has rank
VERIFIED: BattlePulse WIN moment (#1) is persistent (not auto-dismiss) with amber Share CTA
VERIFIED: BattlePulse LOSS moment shows 'Act now' button
VERIFIED: StoryViewerPage shows battle_rank-aware viral share prompt
VERIFIED: TrendingPublicFeed cards show hook text overlay ('Battle in progress', 'X people competing for #1')
VERIFIED: TrendingPublicFeed cards show LIVE indicator for stories with competitors
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0/P0.5/P1 features fully verified. Key features: (1) Push notification system with VAPID keys configured, subscribe/unsubscribe endpoints working. (2) battle_rank_snapshot collection tracks ALL user ranks for rank drop notifications. (3) BattlePulse shows WIN moment (persistent, amber share CTA) and LOSS moment ('Act now' button). (4) StoryViewerPage shows battle_rank in battle status banner and rank-aware viral share prompt. (5) TrendingPublicFeed shows hook text overlays ('Battle in progress', 'X people competing for #1') and LIVE indicators. (6) Service worker sw-push.js has trigger-specific actions and vibration patterns.
